response.original_title: Oakwood College Precious Memories 1988-89 Music Video Highlights
response.overview: A rich and uplifting collection of gospel performances, Oakwood College Precious Memories: 1988–89 Video Highlights captures the vibrant musical spirit of Oakwood College during one of its most dynamic eras. Featuring choirs, ensembles, quartets, and standout soloists, this compilation showcases the depth of talent that shaped the school’s renowned musical legacy.  Recorded across campus and preserved by Black In The Day Adventist Productions, the program includes stirring spirituals, contemporary gospel selections, traditional hymns, and memorable collaborations—most notably a young Brian McKnight appearing alongside Sybil Beaulieu and Chris Willis. The Freshman Mass Choir (later known as Dynamic Praise) delivers several energetic selections, while The Aeolians, Foundation, Unity, and the USM Mass Choir contribute signature performances that highlight Oakwood’s unmatched choral tradition.
response.title: Oakwood College Precious Memories 1988-89 Music Video Highlights
